understanding.goal_understanding: The goal of the game was to reach the goal gem tile marked `+` by navigating through each level, avoiding spikes and using clicks to remove breakable blocks to open a path downward or upward depending on the gravity direction.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement was primarily horizontal (MOVE_LEFT, MOVE_RIGHT), after which the character would fall in the current gravity direction until landing on a solid tile, hitting a hazard, or reaching the goal. CLICK could remove breakable blocks (x) without advancing turns, while MOVE actions consumed turns. Spikes (u, v) killed instantly. Gravity direction determined the fall path, and the corridor scan showed landing positions for each column reachable horizontally, with passages indicating different y-levels. UNDO could revert a previous action if a mistake was made.

Agent explained goal and mechanics.

understanding.goal_understanding: The goal of the game was to reach the goal gem tile marked `+` by navigating through each level, avoiding spikes and using clicks to remove breakable blocks to open a path downward or upward depending on the gravity direction.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement was primarily horizontal (MOVE_LEFT, MOVE_RIGHT), after which the character would fall in the current gravity direction until landing on a solid tile, hitting a hazard, or reaching the goal. CLICK could remove breakable blocks (x) without advancing turns, while MOVE actions consumed turns. Spikes (u, v) killed instantly. Gravity direction determined the fall path, and the corridor scan showed landing positions for each column reachable horizontally, with passages indicating different y-levels. UNDO could revert a previous action if a mistake was made.
